metrics.title: Velvet Bloom | Beauty Salon & Day Spa
metrics.bodyText:
Services
Standards
Pricing
Gallery
Contacts us
Feel renewed and beautiful at Velvet Bloom

Calm renewal, polished care, and a softly restored glow.

Book a visit
Our services
Cosmetology

Personalized skin treatments, cleansing rituals, and restorative care that leave your complexion refreshed, balanced, and luminous at every unhurried visit.

Massage

Slow therapeutic bodywork that eases deep tension, restores calm, supports circulation, and helps you leave feeling lighter through every measured touch.

Nails service

Meticulous manicures and pedicures shaped with premium products, polished detail, and a soft finish made to last beautifully through the final coat.

Makeup

Natural, event-ready, and editorial makeup artistry tailored to your features, your style, and the way you want to feel with a finish that still feels like you.

Standards of care

Every tool, towel, and treatment station is prepared with careful hygiene standards before your visit begins.

Your appointment is handled by trained specialists who balance technical precision with an easy, attentive touch.

Soft light, warm textures, and thoughtful pacing make each service feel calm from arrival through checkout.

Types of procedures & pricing
Cosmetology

Book a visit
Gallery of our space
Reviews

Amanda Dolson

The room felt calm the moment I walked in. My facial was gentle, unrushed, and tailored to my skin, and I left with the softest glow I have had all season.

Sarah Mitchell

Velvet Bloom has become my monthly reset. The team remembers the small details, explains every step, and makes a simple appointment feel like a retreat.

Jessica Park

I booked a massage and manicure before a weekend event, and everything was beautifully paced. The space is serene, and the finish lasted.

Need help choosing your next service?

Share your phone number and our studio will call you back.
